name: Minnesota Minestrone
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat, onion, and garlic in a Dutch oven until the meat is brown.
2. Drain off the excess fat.
3. Stir in the undrained tomatoes, undrained kidney beans, undrained corn, and remaining ingredients except the cheese.
4. Break up the tomatoes as you do.
5. Heat to boiling.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, until the macaroni and vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Serve hot with Parmesan cheese.
